summary: Extend check-agents-drift.mjs proposals with rich markdown diffs showing exact line context and proposed replacements instead of simple change-X-to-Y text
root_cause: Drift proposals only said 'Change X to Y' without showing the actual AGENTS.md line or surrounding context
fix_approach: Added findClaimLine() to locate the documented value in the AGENTS.md content; generateProposal() now emits ```diff blocks with @@ file:line @@ headers, - original and + proposed lines

validation.notes: Verified proposal output contains diff blocks with correct line references
